title: Items 12-22 Overview -- Midland Ave Lot Acquisition and DPW Infrastructure Batch
summary: Councilor Majok presents items 12-22. Item 12: $5,000 acquisition of vacant 0.1-acre lot at 636-638 Midland Ave near the creek for passive recreational green space, consolidating city ownership of a flood zone block. DPW staff confirms property has been vacant 20+ years. Brief overview of remaining items before detailed presentations.
raw_content:
[00:05:15] >> Thank you, Madam President. I have item
[00:05:18] 12 to 22.
[00:05:23] Anybody from BPW here?
[00:05:31] >> You can take draw. [laughter]
[00:05:35] >> I'm not purchasing this lot on Midland.
[00:05:37] Uh we own most of the properties in the
[00:05:39] area. Property owner approached us uh
[00:05:41] looking to get rid of his property. Got
[00:05:43] it appraised. the sale prices for a
[00:05:45] little less than appraised value, I
[00:05:46] think. And this is just to create um an
[00:05:49] open space assemblage in the
[00:05:50] neighborhood.
[00:05:54] >> Okay.
[00:05:54] >> So, do we know what we want to do with
[00:05:56] it?
[00:05:56] >> Just holding it forever uh forever
[00:05:59] recreational open space, passive
[00:06:00] recreational space. [snorts]
[00:06:03] >> It's right next to the creek lot. So,
[00:06:04] it's forever green space, right?
[00:06:06] >> Yeah. Yeah. It's in the it's in the
[00:06:08] flood zone. Um but yeah, we thought it
[00:06:11] was in the city's advantage when it was
[00:06:12] available to to you know defensively buy
[00:06:14] it so that we can have uninterrupted
[00:06:15] ownership of the block.
[00:06:17] >> Okay. Is [clears throat] getting bought
[00:06:18] from a resident or from who?
[00:06:20] >> Um
[00:06:21] I do believe it's neighborhood resident.
[00:06:23] Obviously it's vacant land so the person
[00:06:24] wasn't living there at the time but
[00:06:26] >> the the space has been vacant for my
[00:06:29] entire life.
[00:06:30] >> 20 20 years at least. [laughter] Yeah.
[00:06:33] >> Okay.
[00:06:33] >> Thanks all. But thank you.
[00:06:37] Um, guess the next one may be Mayor
[00:06:40] Robersonson
[00:06:42] >> or Neil. Neil, is that you?
[00:06:45] >> That's Neil.
[00:06:47] >> Good afternoon, council. Afternoon. Um,
processing_notes: $5,000 amount from agenda description not detected in transcript. Remaining items (13-22) covered in detail in subsequent segments.
